title: oxydectes serpyllifolia
intro: Oxydectes serpyllifolia, also known as the Creeping Thyme, is a low-growing, spreading herbaceous perennial plant that belongs to the mint family. The medicinal properties of Creeping Thyme include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of consuming Creeping Thyme include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Creeping Thyme is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and improve sleep quality.
